title: C9 Response stream v0 (serve-loop MVP)
description: C9 is an HTTP streamed response, not a single JSON document. WIRE FORMAT: the body is a run of UTF-8 answer-text chunks, then a single U+001E (RECORD SEPARATOR, '\u001e') byte, then exactly one JSON 'end frame' (this schema), then EOF. To parse: read/display everything before the first \u001e as the answer; JSON-parse everything after it as the end frame. Mid-turn frames are reserved for later versions and are NOT emitted in v0.

error.description: Present only on failure; when set, the answer text before the separator may be partial or empty.
